scripts.test:smoke: E2E_PORT_ACTION=${E2E_PORT_ACTION:-kill} bash ../scripts/e2e-port-preflight.sh && BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 SKIP_WEBSERVER=0 E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME=${E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME:-0} PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=${PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER:-0} playwright test --project=chromium tests/smoke-public.spec.ts
scripts.test:ci: E2E_PORT_ACTION=${E2E_PORT_ACTION:-kill} bash ../scripts/e2e-port-preflight.sh && BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 CI=1 SKIP_WEBSERVER=0 E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME=${E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME:-0} PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=${PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER:-0} playwright test --project=chromium --project=firefox --project=webkit
